mapper.select: SELECT rt.route_name, rt.start_unit_id, rt.end_unit_id, rg.start_point_hc, rg.end_point_hc, rg.route_hc, st_asText(rg.geom) as geom FROM route_cph rc JOIN route_geometry rg ON rc.route_id = rg.route_id JOIN route_template rt ON rc.route_id = rt.id WHERE rc.cph =#{sPlateName}
SELECT ldbh FROM public.zy_jzljyc WHERE ldbh LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY ldbh DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT ssqymc FROM public.jcss_jsy WHERE #{sPlateName} = ANY(string_to_array(bdclhp, ' ')) LIMIT 1
SELECT a.bh FROM ( SELECT wsclcbh AS bh, wsclcmc AS name FROM jcss_wsclc UNION ALL SELECT czcbm AS bh, czcmc AS name FROM jcss_ljcz ) a WHERE a.name = #{factName} LIMIT 1
SELECT czbbh FROM public.jcss_czp WHERE ssdwbm = #{factName}
SELECT czjlid FROM public.zy_clczjl WHERE cphm = #{plate} AND czdd IN (SELECT wsclcmc FROM jcss_wsclc WHERE wsclcbh = #{siteCode}) AND DATE(czsj) = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY czsj DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ldbh FROM public.zy_jzljyc WHERE yscph = #{plate} AND jsgdbh IN (SELECT wsclcbh FROM jcss_wsclc WHERE wsclcbh = #{siteCode}) AND DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP(ycrq::TEXT || ' ' || ycsj::TEXT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY ycrq DESC, ycsj DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT y.ldbh FROM zy_jzljyc y INNER JOIN zy_clczjl c ON y.ldbh = c.ldbh WHERE c.cphm = #{plateNumber} AND c.czcbm = #{siteCode} AND c.czlx = '3' AND y.ldzt IN ('1', '2', '3') ORDER BY c.czsj DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ld.ldbh, ld.cphm, ld.ldzt FROM zy_ldjl ld WHERE ld.ldbh = #{ldbh}
SELECT ldbh FROM zy_ldjl WHERE cphm = #{cphm} AND ldzt IN ('2', '1') ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT rc.cph, rt.route_name, rg.geom, rr.yz_value_min, rr.yz_value_max,rg.route_hc FROM route_cph rc JOIN route_geometry rg ON rc.route_id = rg.route_id JOIN route_template rt ON rc.route_id = rt.id JOIN route_rule rr ON rc.route_id = rr.route_id WHERE rc.cph = #{platePhone} AND rr.rule_type = #{ruleType}

WITH vehicle_route AS( SELECT rc.cph, rt.route_name, rg.geom, rr.yz_value_min, rr.yz_value_max,rg.route_hc FROM route_cph rc JOIN route_geometry rg ON rc.route_id = rg.route_id JOIN route_template rt ON rc.route_id = rt.id JOIN route_rule rr ON rc.route_id = rr.route_id WHERE rr.rule_type = '1' AND rc.cph = #{platePhone} ) SELECT CASE WHEN vr.geom IS NULL THEN 'NO_ROUTE' WHEN NOT ST_DWithin( ST_Point(#{longitude}, #{latitude})::geography, vr.geom::geography, vr.route_hc ) THEN 'DEVIATION' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS is_deviation , round( ST_Distance( ST_Point(#{longitude}, #{latitude})::geography, vr.geom::geography )::numeric , 2)::TEXT AS czyf
FROM vehicle_route vr

SELECT rc.cph, rt.route_name, rg.geom, rr.yz_value_min, rr.yz_value_max,rg.route_hc FROM route_cph rc JOIN route_geometry rg ON rc.route_id = rg.route_id JOIN route_template rt ON rc.route_id = rt.id JOIN route_rule rr ON rc.route_id = rr.route_id WHERE rr.rule_type = '3' AND rc.cph = #{platePhone}

SELECT rc.cph, rt.route_name, rg.geom, rr.yz_value_min, rr.yz_value_max,rg.route_hc FROM route_cph rc JOIN route_geometry rg ON rc.route_id = rg.route_id JOIN route_template rt ON rc.route_id = rt.id JOIN route_rule rr ON rc.route_id = rr.route_id WHERE rr.rule_type = '4' AND rc.cph = #{platePhone}

SELECT gps_time as gpsTime, ST_X(geom) as longitude, ST_Y(geom) as latitude, speed FROM cz_gps WHERE plate_phone = #{platePhone} AND gps_time >= CAST(#{currentTime} AS TIMESTAMP) - CAST(#{maxStayMinutes} || ' minutes' AS INTERVAL) AND gps_time <= CAST(#{currentTime} AS TIMESTAMP) AND geom IS NOT NULL -- 确保有几何数据 ORDER BY gps_time DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT st_within( ST_SetSRID(ST_Point(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), geom ) FROM "public".fence_geom WHERE fence_status='1'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM "public".wn_transport_data1 WHERE s_detect_code = #{sDetectCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wn_transport_data ( s_detect_code, s_site_code, s_date_time, s_plate_name, n_total_weight, n_enter_channel, n_enter_aspect, s_exit_time, s_base64_body_data, driver_name, carid, consignee, dispatcher, product_name, suttle, notes, ldbh, czjlid, ldzt ) VALUES ( #{sDetectCode}, #{sSiteCode}, #{sDateTime}, #{sPlateName}, #{nTotalWeight}, #{nEnterChannel}, #{nEnterAspect}, #{sExitTime}, #{sBase64BodyData}, #{driverName}, #{carid}, #{consignee}, #{dispatcher}, #{productName}, #{suttle}, #{notes}, #{ldbh}, #{czjlid}, '0' )
mapper.update: UPDATE zy_jzljys SET sjlx = ST_GeomFromText(#{trackLine}) WHERE ldbh = #{ldbh}
UPDATE zy_jzljyc SET ldzt = '4' WHERE ldbh = #{ldbh} AND ldzt != '4'
UPDATE zy_jzljys SET ldzt = '4' WHERE ldbh = #{ldbh} AND ldzt != '4'
UPDATE zy_jzljjs SET ldzt = '4' WHERE ldbh = #{ldbh} AND ldzt != '4'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wn_transport_data1 ( s_detect_code, s_site_code, s_date_time, s_plate_name, n_total_weight, n_enter_channel, n_enter_aspect, s_exit_time, s_base64_head_data, s_base64_tail_data, s_base64_body_data, s_base64_plate_data, vehicle_type, driver_name, carid, phone, drivers_license, driving_license, weigh_mode, operator_one, operator_two, operation_one_time, operation_two_time, operating_unit, specs, consignee, dispatcher, product_name, weigh_type, suttle, time_stamp_one, time_stamp_two, unit, time_stamp_one_time, time_stamp_one_photo, time_stamp_two_time, time_stamp_two_photo, modifications, last_modification_time, erp_id, notes, consignee_man, dispatcher_man, responsible_entity, ldbh, czjlid, ldzt ) VALUES ( #{sDetectCode}, #{sSiteCode}, #{sDateTime}, #{sPlateName}, #{nTotalWeight}, #{nEnterChannel}, #{nEnterAspect}, #{sExitTime}, #{sBase64HeadData}, #{sBase64TailData}, #{sBase64BodyData}, #{sBase64PlateData}, #{vehicleType}, #{driverName}, #{carid}, #{phone}, #{driversLicense}, #{drivingLicense}, #{weighMode}, #{operatorOne}, #{operatorTwo}, #{operationOneTime}, #{operationTwoTime}, #{operatingUnit}, #{specs}, #{consignee}, #{dispatcher}, #{productName}, #{weighType}, #{suttle}, #{timeStampOne}, #{timeStampTwo}, #{unit}, #{timeStampOneTime}, #{timeStampOnePhoto}, #{timeStampTwoTime}, #{timeStampTwoPhoto}, #{modifications}, #{lastModificationTime}, #{erpId}, #{notes}, #{consigneeMan}, #{dispatcherMan}, #{responsibleEntity}, #{ldbh}, #{czjlid}, '0' )

SELECT 'BJ' || TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(NEXTVAL('bj_id_seq')::TEXT, 5, '0')
insert into jgzc_ycbj
bjjlid,
glywdh,
ywlx,
bjlz,
bjsj,
bjdjdz,
bjjb,
cphm,
czyf,
czzt,
czr,
czsj,
fjxx,
bz,
#{bjjlid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{glywdh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ywlx,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{bjlz,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{bjsj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ST_GeomFromText(#{bjdjdz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 4326),
#{bjjb,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{cphm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{czyf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{czzt,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{czr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{czsj,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{fjxx,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bz,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

SELECT 'LD' || to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(nextval('zy_ldjl_seq')::TEXT, 5, '0')
INSERT INTO zy_ldjl ( ldid, ldbh, cphm, ldzt, ycczjlid, ycczdd, ycczsj, ycjz, ycjsgdbh, ycczcbm, jscczjlid, jscczdd, jscczsj, jscjz, jscjsgdbh, jscczcbm, sjlx, create_time, complete_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{ldid}, #{ldbh}, #{cphm}, #{ldzt}, #{ycczjlid}, #{ycczdd}, #{ycczsj}, #{ycjz}, #{ycjsgdbh}, #{ycczcbm}, #{jscczjlid}, #{jscczdd}, #{jscczsj}, #{jscjz}, #{jscjsgdbh}, #{jscczcbm}, #{sjlx}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{completeTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM zy_ldjl WHERE ldbh = #{ldbh}
mapper.update: UPDATE zy_ldjl SET ldzt = #{ldzt}, jscczjlid = #{jscczjlid}, jscczdd = #{jscczdd}, jscczsj = #{jscczsj}, jscjz = #{jscjz}, jscjsgdbh = #{jscjsgdbh}, jscczcbm = #{jscczcbm}, complete_time = #{completeTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ldbh = #{ldbh}
mapper.select: SELECT id, ldbh, cphm, longitude, latitude, speed, direction, gps_time as gpsTime, create_time as createTime FROM zy_clwz WHERE ldbh = #{ldbh} ORDER BY gps_time ASC
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM fence_geom f WHERE ST_Contains( f.geom, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{lng}, #{lat}), 4326) ) )

SELECT ST_Distance( ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{lng}, #{lat}), 4326)::geography, (SELECT rg.geom FROM route_cph rc JOIN route_geometry rg ON rc.route_id = rg.route_id JOIN route_template rt ON rc.route_id = rt.id JOIN route_rule rr ON rc.route_id = rr.route_id WHERE rr.rule_type = '1' AND rc.cph = #{platePhone})::geography )

SELECT rc.cph, rt.id as route_id, rt.route_name, ST_AsText(rg.geom) as geom_wkt, rg.route_hc,
-- 路线偏离规则 (rule_type = '1') MAX(CASE WHEN rr.rule_type = '1' THEN rr.yz_value_min END) as deviation_min, MAX(CASE WHEN rr.rule_type = '1' THEN rr.yz_value_max END) as deviation_max,
-- 超时停留规则 (rule_type = '2') MAX(CASE WHEN rr.rule_type = '2' THEN rr.yz_value_min END) as stay_min, MAX(CASE WHEN rr.rule_type = '2' THEN rr.yz_value_max END) as stay_max,
-- 运输超时规则 (rule_type = '3') MAX(CASE WHEN rr.rule_type = '3' THEN rr.yz_value_min END) as transport_min, MAX(CASE WHEN rr.rule_type = '3' THEN rr.yz_value_max END) as transport_max
FROM route_cph rc JOIN route_geometry rg ON rc.route_id = rg.route_id JOIN route_template rt ON rc.route_id = rt.id LEFT JOIN route_rule rr ON rc.route_id = rr.route_id WHERE rc.cph = #{platePhone} GROUP BY rc.cph, rt.id, rt.route_name, rg.geom, rg.route_hc
SELECT ST_Distance( ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{lon1}, #{lat1}), 4326)::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{lon2}, #{lat2}), 4326)::geography ) as distance
